highlights.summary: The registration deadline for AP EAPCET 2026 (without a late fee) has been extended to Mar 17, 2026, for College Veterinary Science, Garividi, Vizayanagaram - Sri Venkateswara Veterinary University admission to BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. and A.H.) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: It is only helpful if you are interested in treating animals.

review_content.Placements: We haven't had any outgoing batches from our college yet, as it is a newly established institution. The first batch, the 2020 batch, is still pursuing graduation here. However, as far as we know, after graduation, veterinarians can pursue government jobs, such as veterinary surgeons. Pet clinics are also managed by vets, and a wide range of private sectors welcomes talented veterinarians.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our hostel infrastructure is very impressive. As this is a recently constructed college, we have an advanced hostel with spacious rooms and wide corridors. We also have a good playground and shuttle courts in the hostel. The food in the hostel is comparatively good.

faqs.question: Does Government Nizamia Tibbi College provide good placement facilities?
faqs.answer: Government Nizamia Tibbi College has been rated 5 on placements.

faqs.question: What are the courses that Government Nizamia Tibbi College offers?
faqs.answer: Courses offered by Government Nizamia Tibbi College are BUMS, MD. These courses are in the stream of Medicine & Health Sciences.

faqs.question: Is Government Nizamia Tibbi College a known college/Institute?
faqs.answer: Government Nizamia Tibbi College is a well-known institution for BUMS, MD courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Government Nizamia Tibbi College has a rating of 4.4 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 5 on campuslife, 5 on placements, 4 on faculty and 3 on Infrastructure.

faqs.question: How is the faculty at Government Nizamia Tibbi College?
faqs.answer: Government Nizamia Tibbi College has been rated 4 for faculty as per reviews by students. This shows that Institute has qualified and experienced faculty members.

A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Government Nizamia Tibbi College is up to 111. Good thing to know is that Government Nizamia Tibbi College has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like CCIM.

reviews_list.batch_info: BUMS - Bachelor of Unani Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It provides good placements.

review_content.Placements: Students get placements here, after qualifying NEET examination. Each year thousands of students apply here and 90-95% can make it to the college. The cut-off score changes each year. Around 41/2 years of UG course, 2 years of Internship, and then PG. You can practice Unani after your Internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Since this was built during the Nizams period, the infrastructure is antique, old and a little destroyed now. It's Asia's 3rd largest Unani College. The buildings are spacious. The area comprises OPD, IPD, college, and hostel blocks. College buildings provide laboratory facilities, research cells, and other departments.

admission_overview.college_name: Sanskaram University Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Sanskaram University admission 2025 is merit-based. The university offers over 30 UG, PG and Doctorate programmes through its School ofEngineering, Health & Allied Science,Hospitalityetc. Some of the popular courses atSanskaram Universityare MBA, BTech, MTech, BSc and MSc. The university offers BTech, MTech, BCA, BSc, MSc, MCA and PhD courses through the School of Engineering. Sanskaram University provides various scholarships, including those based on CUET scores, sports achievements, and merit-cum-means (MCM) criteria. The MCM scholarship is applicable only for the first-year tuition fee. Students can apply for scholarships starting in July.

The university offers courses across various specialisations, and aspirants need to apply for courses through the official website. Candidates can read the table below to learn more aboutSanskaram University courseadmission highlights for 2025:
Particulars
Sanskaram University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes offered
30+ courses across various specialisations
How to apply?
Application Status
Level of programmes offered
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from the official website.

Sanskaram University offers courses at multiple levels through its 12 schools, namely Engineering & Technology, Management & Commerce, Medical & Allied Science, Basic & Applied Sciences, Hotel Management, Architecture and Agricultural Science, Humanities and Education. Check below the top KRMU courses along with their eligibility, fee and selection criteria:
Sanskaram University admission process include registration, selection and fee payment. Below are the steps to get a seat in Sanskaram University:
STEP 1: Sanskaram University Application Process 2025

Candidates must download the application form from the official website of Sanskaram University. Besides, candidates can also apply online. Aspirants need to pay an application fee to apply for a course. Candidates will also need to submit the specified documents during the application process.
STEP 2: Selection
Sanskaram University shortlists candidates for admission based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. The university evaluates the application form of the candidates for their eligibility.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once selected, candidates need to pay theSanskaram University course feeto confirm their seat in the college.

courses_data.description: Sanskaram University provides four years B.Tech in several disciplines, which include Computer Science Engineering (CSE) with Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AI & ML), Cyber Security, Cloud Computing, and Gaming and Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, and Information Technology Engineering. class 12 with a mandatory subject pair in Physics and Mathematics and either Chemistry, Computer Science, or Biotechnology are minimum requirements; aspirants have secured at least a 45% aggregate.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A great college that can change your life.

content.Placements: Around 20-30% of the students got placements. Out of this most of the students get package of 4 LPA - 5 LPA, and the highest package is 13 LPA. The lowest package is 3 LPA. We get companies like Deloitte, EY, Northstar, TCS, and many more. Overall, the placement process is good.
content.Infrastructure: We have well-structured classrooms and library. College campus is overall nice with plenty of space. Labs and libraries are available. The minus point is that it has no campus area and no hostel. But that is normal, keeping in mind that the college is in a very posh area.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Management and Finance - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Nice course, good faculty, and one of the top colleges in Mumbai, can go for it.

content.Placements: Placements are good, like you can accept an average salary of around 5-6 LPA, the highest package can go up to 12-15 LPA too, based on someone's skills and capabilities. Some of the top recruiting companies are JP Morgan, EY, Morgan Stanley, and other top companies.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are quite good with ample seating benches with AC and fans. Wi-Fi is there, but speed is not that good, and library is also good with a good amount of books of every genre and subject, and borrowing and returning are all digitalised. As for hostel, there are no hostels, but there are 4 canteens with decent food and desserts.

paragraphs: Mithibai College admissions 2026are both meirit and entrance based. The college is also known as Mithibai College of Arts. This college is affiliated to theUniversity of Mumbai. Mithibai College has 1Degree& 1Junior College.

The Degree College has 3 main departments & 21 sub-departments. Through them, the college is offering 26 UG, 17 PG, & 7 PhD courses in the domains of Arts, Science, & Commerce streams. UG, PG, & PhD-level programmes are available at Mithibai Degree College. The streams include Arts, Commerce, Science, etc.Mithibai Collegeprogramme admissions areentrance-basedfor a lot of offered programmes.

Mithibai College fees include registration fee, alumni fees, uition fee, etc. Students should be able to pay the fee semester-wise. For fee concessions, students should contact the IIST admission office.

Coming to affordability, it is one of the reasons why many leave a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships has made education easy but the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Tabulated below are the fees and packages for some of the courses:
*This information is taken from the official website is flexible.

SVKM’S Mithibai College offers limited seats for its offered courses. The seats are provided once the admission is confirmed and candidates must pay the fee to confirm their seats. Candidates can refer to the following table for Mithibai College seats:
*This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

For admission to a course, students who meet the course-specific eligibility requirement can apply online on the official website. The seat allotment is carried out as per the selection criteria of the respective course. Candidates can refer to the following sections for details on the Mithibai College admission process.
1: Mithibai College Application Process 2026

Students seeking admission to UG and PG programmes must fill out the admission online (mithibai.ac.in). The online admission process at Mithibai College is in addition to the pre-admission registration process of the University of Mumbai. The application process involves registration, form filling, document upload, and fee payment. For some UG courses, admission is through CUET, hence, aspirants must complete theCUET application process.
2: Entrance Exam

Candidates who have registered for CUET need to appear for the exam in the subject of their choice and get a valid score. For PG programmes, candidates need to appear for the Mithibai CET exam. The college conducts this entrance exam in online mode.

3: Release of Cut off or Merit List
A selection list is released that mentions the names of the selected or shortlisted candidates. It is published on the university's official website.
4: Fee Payment & Admission Confirmation
After the final selection, candidates can pay the required fee to confirm their seat. The required amount to be paid shall be confirmed by the college admission office.

outlook.description:
Mithibai College has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Science' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for Mithibai College indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE. It has been seen that in the 'Science' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Mithibai College's rank is #17, the same as last year's rank in the 'Science' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Arts', the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Mithibai College's rank is #12, the same as last year's rank in the 'Arts' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Commerce' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Mithibai College's rank is #7, the same as last year's rank in the 'Commerce' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

videos.title: Mithibai College of Arts, Vile Parle West, Mumbai- College Review by the Students

reviews.review_heading: A great college that can change your life.
reviews.review_text: We have well-structured classrooms and library. College campus is overall nice with plenty of space. Labs and libraries are available. The minus point is that it has no campus area and no hostel. But that is normal, keeping in mind that the college is in a very posh area.

reviews.review_heading: Nice course, good faculty, and one of the top colleges in Mumbai, can go for it.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are quite good with ample seating benches with AC and fans. Wi-Fi is there, but speed is not that good, and library is also good with a good amount of books of every genre and subject, and borrowing and returning are all digitalised. As for hostel, there are no hostels, but there are 4 canteens with decent food and desserts.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the overall experience and really nice for exposure.
reviews.review_text: There is no college-provided hostel. The college has a nice infrastructure compared to other colleges. One thing is that there are multiple colleges in one building, which can sometimes feel frustrating. But overall, it's a nice infrastructure with good furniture, smart boards, a library area, and scanning to enter the college. Medical facilities are also there, along with a gymkhana for indoor games, Wi-Fi across the whole campus, and air-conditioned classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: It is the perfect college for a mixture of academics and social life.
reviews.review_text: We have perfect classrooms with comfortable benches, sensory boards, fully air conditioned classrooms, IT labs, and a sports room. Girls common room, great washrooms, recreational rooms. Four clean canteens, a refreshing sitting area, benches to hang out or refresh mind, and a fully equipped and technology integrated library.

reviews.review_heading: It is absolutely the best college and the campus. The crowd is amazing.
reviews.review_text: Mithibai College provides free Wi-Fi access to all students. A lab research facility is also available with inbuilt air-conditioning in all classrooms on our college campus. The library of Mithibai College is so clean and completely silent for students to focus on their studies.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college with the best college life.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of the college are A1, whether it be a library, classes, and smart boards. The canteen is also nice and affordable, but sometimes it is dirty. I don't have the experience of living in the hostel, so I will not be able to comment on that. There is a turf nearby where students play football.

reviews.review_heading: It is a top degree college in Mumbai. It is a joy to be graduated from this esteemed institution.
reviews.review_text: The college has more than 2 canteens on its premises that offer food at subsidised rates. Classrooms of the college are air-conditioned with projectors for giving presentations. The college is renovated from time to time. It also has a good gymkhana.

reviews.review_heading: I am totally satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities available for our course are very nice and amazing. Everything is neat and clean. Classrooms and library are fully centralized and provide facility of smart boards. There is also a Gymkhana where we can play indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: It is fixed that I want to take admission in Mithibai College. I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure provided for our course are very nice and amazing. Facilities provided by the college are centralized AC classrooms with smartboards, a library, and a gymkhana where we can play indoor games. There are many canteens, and the quality and taste of the food are very nice.

reviews.review_heading: I like their facility behaviour they were very friendly.
reviews.review_text: Having a site annual function with the name of the college in which we used to select interested students to perform in front of our seniors and faculty members for enjoyment, we held this program. Almost every game is included for sports days, excluding a few of them that need to be added on.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with best placements and good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The library is even better than the classrooms for self study. The canteen serves good food at a reasonable price. There are lots of sports and games opportunities for capable athletes. If a student is injured, the college has good medical facilities to help them recover quickly.

reviews.review_heading: Mithibai: a good path for your graduation journey.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities in our college are quite good, having spacious, air-conditioned classrooms, a big library, and projectors in the classroom. It has nice canteens having affordable, tasty food options.
The one drawback is Mithibai College does not have a hostel of its own, so you need to rent a PG for accommodation.

reviews.review_heading: I think the college is very nice and fun, and enjoyable. You can study in the library and have fun o
reviews.review_text: Mithibai is known for its college infrastructure. The college is huge and has a lot of space to hang out and stuff. There are 3 libraries, 4 canteens, computer labs, research labs, and places where you can sit and chill. The college is very clean too. There are many lifts. Every floor you visit there is something new to see. The AC is good and there is a gymkhana.

reviews.review_heading: Honest Mithibai College Review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college provides a suitable place for all the courses to take place within the building. Though the building is small and there's a large number of students in it, it's quite congested. Although, the best part of the college is the canteen. The food is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mithibai College of Arts, Chauhan Institute of Science.
reviews.review_text: I do not stay in the college hostel, so I don't know much about it. The infrastructure is very well-organised with all facilities provided to students. We lag only for the campus for outdoor sports. Some of my friends live in the hostel, and they gave a good review about it.

admission_overview.college_name: Jagannath University Jaipur Course Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

paragraphs: Jagannath University Jaipur admission 2025 isopenfor all courses. The institute offers various courses atUG, PG, Diploma and doctoral level. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exams accepted by the university, such asCUET, GATE, CLAT, NEET, MAT, or CAT/CMAT. Additionally, the university also conducts university-based entrance exams and interviews i.e., JUEE for both UG, PG and diploma courses. Candidates looking for admission toJagannath University Jaipurcan apply on the official website of the university. To know more about Jagannath University Jaipur admission, course eligibility, selection criteria and admission process, go through the following sections:

Jagannath University Jaipur offers entrance-based admission to UG, PG, doctoral and diploma courses. Candidates looking for admission to Jagannath University Jaipur must fill out the basic eligibility criteria to get admission. To be eligible for admission to UG courses, the candidates are required to pass Class 12 from a recognised board and for PG courses, candidates must have an undergraduate degree. After filling out the eligibility criteria, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exam accepted by the university for admission. Want to know more about Jagannath University, Jaipur eligibility selection criteria go through the detailed breakdown:
Eligibility

Jagannath University Jaipur admission process 2025 is ongoing on the official website of the university. The university accepts various entrance exam scores such as CUET, GATE, CLAT,NEET, MAT, orCAT/ CMAT for admission to UG, PG, diploma and doctoral courses. Check below the step-by-stepJagannath University Jaipur admission process:
Step 1: Jagannath University Jaipur Application Process 2025

Jagannath University Jaipur carries online application on its official website. The eligible candidates are to apply online on the official website of the university. It is required that the eligible candidates must have completed the entrance exam formalities & must have qualified the eligibility criteria for their respective courses before applying to the university.
Step 2: Jagannath University Jaipur Selection Process 2025

Admission to the courses is both merit and entrance-based. The selection process includes an entrance exam for admission to UG and PG courses. Further, for other courses, Jagannath University Jaipur offers merit-based admission.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
After candidates get shortlisted in the selection round, they are required to pay a course fee to confirm their admission.

Steps for Jagannath University Jaipur Admission Process 2025

courses_data.name: Jagannath University Jaipur BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Jagannath University Jaipur offers a full-time BE/BTech that lasts 4 years. To get into this programme, students need to have good scores in the JEE Main exam. Below is more information about the eligibility requirements, selection criteria, and fees forJagannath University Jaipur BE/BTech admission 2024:

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to B.Tech at Jagannath University, Jaipur?
faqs.answer: No, Jagannath University Jaipur offers entrance-based admission to BTech. Candidates are required to apply and appear for the accepted entrance exam such as CUET UG/ REAP/JEE/ JUEE & Interview. After filling out the eligibility criteria candidates are required to apply on the official website of the university. After all the procedures the university releases its merit list. If the candidates are shortlisted on merit they are required to pay the admission fee to lock their final seats.

faqs.question: How can I get admission for B.Tech programme at Jagannath University, Jaipur?
faqs.answer: Jagannath University Jaipur offers entrance-based admission to BTech. To be eligible for admission to BTech, candidates must have Class 10 and Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects with 45% from a recognised board. Additionaly, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exam accepted by the university such as CUET UG/ REAP/JEE/ JUEE & Interview. After filling out all the eligibility criteria candidates need to apply for admission form online.

faqs.question: When will Jagannath University Jaipur cutoff list be released?
faqs.answer: The Jagannath University Jaipur cutoff lists are typically released after the respective entrance exam results and counselling processes are completed. For example, the Rajasthan JET cutoff is expected to be released between the fourth week of October and the third week of August. For CUET, the results are already out, and the counselling process is ongoing individually for each participating college.

courses_data.name: Jagannath University Diploma Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Jagannath University, Jaipur offers diploma courses in four specialisations. The duration of theDiploma in Naturopathy & Yoga Sciences and Pharmacyis two years each whereas for diploma in Agriculture and Engineering, isone and three years, respectively. Admission to diploma courses is based on a candidate's performance inJUEEconducted by Jagannath University, followed by a PI round. Further, for some specialisation admission is completely based on the marks obtained by the candidates in Class 10. Below-mentionedJagannath University diploma courseseligibility criteria along with course fees and seat intake:

faqs.question: How many Diploma courses are offered at Jagannath University, Jaipur?
faqs.answer: The college offers five Diploma courses offered by Jagannath University Jaipur. reviews.review_heading: Bad college, bad campus, no placement, and bad behavior of teachers.
reviews.review_text: Bad meals and bad behavior of the warden. Bad labs, no equipment, dirty floors, and bad behavior of lab teachers. Bad facilities and bad behavior of teachers. No medicine was available in college, and the canteen staff had bad behavior. No sports games, huh.

reviews.review_heading: Worth the money, go for it.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of my university are awesome. Wi-Fi is available both on campus and in the hostels. The mess facilities are also good. The food provided in the hostel and canteen is great. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: College is decent, but prefer at least a preference type, not bad.
reviews.review_text: Department is too heavy timing, in fact, everything is decent, classroom, labs and Wi-Fi, but no off on the weekend. Mess and canteen are dirty, and cringe. Sports and games are too messy for all students, not a good investment in sports funding. In fact, the gym equipment is too old and corroded.

reviews.review_heading: Worth the money for the course.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course are very awesome, feels like home. The Wi-Fi facilities in classrooms and hostels are also good. The food facilities provided in the mess and canteen are very nice. Medicine facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: College is awesome.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructures of the college is very nice. Wi-Fi facility is available in both the hostel and campus. The rooms and facilities in the hostel are also good. The food provided in mess and canteen is also good. Medical and sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: If I may say, this college is perfect for every family, including middle-class families.
reviews.review_text: Every kind of facility is available in Jagannath University, like better speed Wi-Fi, advanced labs, better AC classrooms, and a library in which every kind of book is available. If we talk about the hostel, both AC and non-AC rooms are available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: My college provides me with the best knowledge that enhances my skills.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with Wi-Fi at all times and has good labs where we gain valuable knowledge from all the experiments. The classrooms are spacious and have Wi-Fi, creating an excellent environment with clean facilities. The library has all the necessary resources, and the canteen facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available, and classrooms have AC facilities. The library has a wide range of books. Hostels food is very delicious. The medical facilities are good, and sports facilities are very good. The mess food is also very delicious. Games are well played by players and the club.

reviews.review_heading: There is scope in Physiotherapy from Jagannath University Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: Facilites available in my department are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, seminar hall, auditorium, etc. The quality of facilites in the hostel is good. The quality of food in the mess is nice but in the canteen, it is okay. Medical and sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Jagannath University has good ingratiating and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Best facilities and infrastructure are there. Every equipment is available in pharmacy lab. Wi-Fi is also there. The quality of food in canteen is good. Good quantity of books is there in the library. Every Saturday, free sports and games are conducted for students. Gym equipment is also good. Classrooms are clean and standard.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities, such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries, are there. Mess and canteen also have hygiene and a clean environment with proper management. All things are provided for sports. Many opportunities are also provided in a proper manner.

reviews.review_heading: Jagannath University: A delightful place for me.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure for our course are very good; everything is available for the students to do programming. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries are well maintained. The facilities provided in the hostel are also very good; everything is on time. Food quality is also good here, and everything else is also present here.

reviews.review_heading: Please take admission at your own responsibility.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the course is not valuable because all systems are old and very poor; they are used only for garbage, so the infrastructure is not good. The hostel is good for living, and the food is average. All things are average, like cleaning, and management is not good here.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, I am satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The food served in the hostel is decent. The playground is available for sports like cricket, football, and volleyball. The medical facilities are good. There are separate blocks for every branch and sufficient labs for practical knowledge. The classrooms are neat. The Wi-Fi is enabled. The library is good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college for the BBA course.
reviews.review_text: University is having a good infrastructure for the BBA course. Facilities such as library, canteen, sports, Wi-Fi, etc., are of decent quality. College has a pretty good campus. Bus stop is located at walkable distance. Canteen food is good to eat. Other necessary facilities are also available in the college.

faqs.answer: A:    Dr Vaishampayan Memorial Government Medical College is a well-known institution for PG Diploma, MD, MS, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Dr Vaishampayan Memorial Government Medical College has course specializations in Anaesthesia, Pathology, ENT, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Orthopaedics, Radiology, Psychiatry, Pulmonary Medicine, Community Medicine, Biochemistry, General Medicine, Microbiology, Pediatrics, Physiology, Anatomy, Ophthalmology, General Surgery.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Dr Vaishampayan Memorial Government Medical College?

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college and provides the best education, so I recommend everyone take it.

review_content.Placements: Our college is one of the best colleges in Maharashtra. In our college, a batch of 200 students is selected through NEET. We don't have a package as a doctor, but recently one of our passed-out students did the surgery on spina bifida; he holds the title of the first surgeon to do this surgery.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel's facilities are good. We have a batch of 200 students, so we have to share a room between four people, but its accommodation capacity is only two people. Food in a mess is good, but it is not a government mess; it is a private mess, and we have to pay monthly for it. We have a ground, and our seniors conduct matches of cricket, basketball, kho, and football.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Dr. Vaishampayan memorial government medical college.

review_content.Placements: The placements are good here. The civil hospital provides an internship for one year where we get good clinical exposure. Many students from our campus have secured PG seats at AIIMS and other top institutes in the country. The internship provided here is very comparable to those at top colleges in Maharashtra.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is well equipped with all the necessary facilities. The library is up to date with the latest versions of authors. A Wi-Fi facility is not available for students as such. There are 5 canteens on campus: 1 in the college, 3 in the hospital, and 1 in the hostel campus. The food is okay.

faqs.answer: The cutoff trend for MBBS at Dr Vaishampayan Memorial Government Medical College has been decreasing in the recent years. In 2022, the closing rank for MBBS under general category for all India quota was 24865. In 2023, it decreased to 15052. Likewise, the cut off ranks have changed from 27011 to 16716 for OBC 103517 to 95974 for SC 250340 to 118478 for ST. This trend is likely to continue in the coming years, as the demand for engineering education in India continues to grow. Similar cut off trend can be seen for female candidates under all categories however the ranks are slightly different.

faqs.question: What is the NEET UG Round 3 cut off for MBBS at Dr Vaishampayan Memorial Government Medical College?

answer.text: Dr Vaishampayan Memorial Government Medical College NEET UG Round 3 cutoff for MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery is 15052 which is very close to this range. With this rank, there is a probability of getting admission however since, the cut offs keep changing from round to round, better ranks definitely increases your chances of getting admission in Dr Vaishampayan Memorial Government Medical College.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at Dr Vaishampayan Memorial Government Medical College in MBBS if my rank is between 15000 and 16000?

overview_faqs.answer: Dr Vaishampayan Memorial Government Medical College is a renowned institution offering PG Diploma, MD, MS, MBBS. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. review_summary.college_name: Dr Vaishampayan Memorial Government Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This college is a gem in all aspects.

content.Placements: Since it's a government medical college, all the students get to do their paid internships after the final year, after which they either work in some hospital or start preparing for the PG entrance. You don't have to worry about placements when you are in the medical field.
content.Infrastructure: The lecture halls are well ventilated, can accommodate all 200 students, and are well-equipped with projectors and whiteboards. The main halls even have air conditioning. The college has library, canteen, labs, and basically everything. Talking about the hostel, the rooms we got are triple occupancy rooms having fans and since the weather is too hot, we're allowed to install our own air coolers in our rooms (but with permission). Each hostel has a common reading room. There are common washrooms on each floor. The hostel campus has a lot of halls for various activities and sports grounds for cricket, volleyball, basketball, etc.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely a very good medical college with good faculty .

content.Placements: I am a first-year MBBS student and in a batch of 200 students, 30 are from the all-India quota and 170 are from the state quota. After 4.5 years of course, an internship was provided by the college. In a first-year course, the total number of subjects is three, namely anatomy, physiology and biochemistry.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is 60 years old so the infrastructure is not very good, and the hostel campus is also old. Canteen and reading room are available on the hostel campus and a library is present on the college campus. A total of three mess is present. Large ground present. All subject labs are available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college and provides the best education, so I recommend everyone take it.

content.Placements: Our college is one of the best colleges in Maharashtra. In our college, a batch of 200 students is selected through NEET. We don't have a package as a doctor, but recently one of our passed-out students did the surgery on spina bifida; he holds the title of the first surgeon to do this surgery.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel's facilities are good. We have a batch of 200 students, so we have to share a room between four people, but its accommodation capacity is only two people. Food in a mess is good, but it is not a government mess; it is a private mess, and we have to pay monthly for it. We have a ground, and our seniors conduct matches of cricket, basketball, kho, and football.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Dr. Vaishampayan memorial government medical college.

content.Placements: The placements are good here. The civil hospital provides an internship for one year where we get good clinical exposure. Many students from our campus have secured PG seats at AIIMS and other top institutes in the country. The internship provided here is very comparable to those at top colleges in Maharashtra.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is well equipped with all the necessary facilities. The library is up to date with the latest versions of authors. A Wi-Fi facility is not available for students as such. There are 5 canteens on campus: 1 in the college, 3 in the hospital, and 1 in the hostel campus. The food is okay.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with faculty members of college, facilities are well.

content.Placements: Percentage of students placed is 80%. The highest package offered is in MD medicine. The lowest is in MD radiology and average in MD biochemistry. Percentage of students who got internship 100%. Top roles offered in my college are MD radiology, MD dermatology, MD medicine, MS.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for course are labs, classrooms, library, but no Wi-Fi. Qualities of facilities in the hostel are good; food available in mess is dissatisfying; medical facilities, sports and games facilities are above average.

In the meantime, candidates who are seeking admission can check the sections below to view the Government Siddha Medical College, Chennai cutoff 2024 across different exams, courses, categories, and rounds. A few more updates are given below:

The Government Siddha Medical College, Chennai BSMS Cutoff 2024 has been published for Round 4. The cutoff for the BSMS was published category-wise for General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS and PWD category candidates. Inferring the Round 4 Government Siddha Medical College, Chennai AYUSH NEET UG cutoff 2024, for the AI quota, closing rank for General category students was 153115. The most sought-after course as per the cutoff list is Bachelor of Siddha Medicine and Surgery (BSMS).

Government Siddha Medical College, Chennai cutoff 2024 has been released, for the fourth round for the candidates seeking admission to the NEET UG course. As per the AYUSH NEET UG Round 4 Seat Allotment Result, the most in-demand course was Bachelor of Siddha Medicine and Surgery (BSMS) with a cutoff rank of 153115 for the students belonging to the General AI category.

Government Siddha Medical College, Chennai admission to the UG courses is based on valid AYUSH NEET UG scores, followed by a counselling round. A direct link will be provided below to download the counselling result for AYUSH NEET 2024 counselling.

faqs.answer: A:    No, the fees for all eight semesters of SRHU's BPharma programme is not the same. This is because the students have to pay certain one-time charges during the first and the sixth semester of the programme, in addition to the semesterly installment of the tuition fee and the examination fee. The one-time charges payable during the first semester include the enrollment fee, security deposit and the admission fee. During the sixth semester, students have to pay an Industry visit fee of INR 10,000. The total tuition fee for BPharma students under the All India Category is INR 5.2 lakh. The tuition fee for Permanent Residents of Uttarakhand is INR 3.85 lakh for four years. reviews_list.review_title: Overall average, not bad.

review_content.Placements: Placements in the engineering college are moderate. Students who put in personal effort usually get placed. This year, highest salary package offered is around 5 LPA, as far as I know. Opportunities exist, but mostly for the self-driven. Overall, it's average.
review_content.Infrastructure: If we talk specifically about the engineering college, the infrastructure is more moderate in scale. Classrooms are well-maintained and equipped with essential facilities such as benches, whiteboards, fans, and projectors, which are suitable for regular academic use. Library is small in size considering the number of students enrolled. Computer lab facilities are one of the better aspects of the infrastructure. There is one large lab that can accommodate around 60 students and five smaller labs, each with a capacity of 30.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: If you want to choose nursing, this college is the best.

review_content.Placements: All students get placement after completing the course. The highest salary is around Rs. 50,000 per month. The lowest is Rs. 15,000 per month. All students get internships in our course at our college. This course has a 100% placement guarantee and job security.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a huge building with advanced lecture theatres with projectors. There is a large auditorium, simulation labs, and a central library for students. Hostel is well-maintained with clean rooms. The food provided in the mess and canteen is good and hygienic. There are multiple courts and a university ground for games in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Best nursing college in Uttarakhand.

review_content.Placements: Almost all students get placement in our university hospital after completion of the course. The minimum salary is Rs. 15,000 and increases with experience. All students get internships at our hospital, which is the best hospital in Dehradun.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms and auditorium are large, with simulation labs, projectors, and a university library with computers for students. The mess is good and hygienic. There is a university ground and courts for matches, along with good medical facilities.

faqs.answer: Yes, SRHU Dehradun offers a full time BTech programme. The programme is offered in the stream of Computer Science and Engineering (CSE). In addition to the BTech in CSE, the university offers BTech (Hons) in CSE in three specialisations. These specialisations are Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Cyber Security, and Data Science & Machine Learning.The duration of the regular programme is four years. The university also allows lateral entry to the third semester of all the BTech specialisations. The duration of lateral entry programmes is three years.
faqs.question: Q: Is B.Tech available at SRHU Dehradun?

faqs.answer: No, the fees for all eight semesters of SRHU's BPharma programme is not the same. This is because the students have to pay certain one-time charges during the first and the sixth semester of the programme, in addition to the semesterly installment of the tuition fee and the examination fee. The one-time charges payable during the first semester include the enrollment fee, security deposit and the admission fee. During the sixth semester, students have to pay an Industry visit fee of INR 10,000. The following table presents the semesterly fee payable by AIC and PRU category candidates admitted to the BPharma programme of SRHU:SemesterAICPRUFee to be paid in First SemesterINR 92,700INR 75,800Fee to be paid in Other SemestersINR 69,000INR 52,100Fee to be paid in Sixth SemesterINR 79,000INR 62,100NOTE: The mentioned fees have been sourced from the official website of the university. They are still subject to change and hence, are indicative.
faqs.question: Q: Is B.Pharma fee at SRHU same for all semesters?

faqs.answer: Yes, SRHU Dehradun offers a full-time BPharma programme that lasts four years. The UG-level programme is offered by through the university's Himalayan School of Pharmaceutical Sciences (HSPS) and is PCI-approved. The university also allows lateral entry directly to the second year of the programme. BPharma admission at SRHU is merit-based. Interested candidates can visit the university's official website to apply for the programme.
faqs.question: Q: Is B.Pharma available at SRHU Dehradun?

The total tuition fee for BPharma students under the All India Category is INR 5.2 lakh. The tuition fee for Permanent Residents of Uttarakhand is INR 3.85 lakh for four years. Other components included in the total fee are one-time fees (cumulative of multiple components), examination fees, etc. The total programme fee for AIC candidates is INR 5.86 lakh. For the Permanent Residents of Uttarakhand, the total BPharma fee is INR 4.51 lakh. It must be noted that the mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at SRHU Dehradun?
overview_faqs.answer: The MBA fee at SRHU is different for the All India Category (AIC) and the Permanent Resident of Uttarakhand (PRU) category. The total tuition fee for MBA students under the All India Category is INR 3.2 lakh. The tuition fee for Permanent Residents of Uttarakhand is INR 2.37 lakh for two years. The one-time fees included in the fee structure are the same for both categories. The total one-time fee payable by MBA students at SRHU is INR 21,500. It must be noted that the mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: Is Swami Rama Himalayan University good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: For MBA, Swami Rama Himalayan University is great. The MBA programme offered by SRHU mingles yoga, meditation and personal development into its coursework. It produces people who are well-balanced and ready to face the pressures of business mentalities in today 's world. The programme places strong emphasis on practical skills and industry experience with internships, guest lectures by business people in the field; coupled with certificates issued directly from relevant industries. With smaller MBA classes than most other larger institutions, SRHU gives its students personal attention and faculties. While other private universities in India charge high fees, MBA at SRHU is economical.SRHU's MBA programme has fewer alumni connections and networks than established business schools. For those who only want traditional business academics and placements, SRHU's focus on personal development may seem a bit of an irrelevance. Now, SRHU provides a general MBA programme in which you may not cho

overview_faqs.question: Is B.Tech available at SRHU Dehradun?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, SRHU Dehradun offers a full time BTech programme. The programme is offered in the stream of Computer Science and Engineering (CSE). In addition to the BTech in CSE, the university offers BTech (Hons) in CSE in three specialisations. These specialisations are Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Cyber Security, and Data Science & Machine Learning.The duration of the regular programme is four years. The university also allows lateral entry to the third semester of all the BTech specialisations. The duration of lateral entry programmes is three years.

This is because the students have to pay certain one-time charges during the first and the sixth semester of the programme, in addition to the semesterly installment of the tuition fee and the examination fee. The one-time charges payable during the first semester include the enrollment fee, security deposit and the admission fee. During the sixth semester, students have to pay an Industry visit fee of INR 10,000. review_summary.college_name: SRHU Dehradun Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college. We gained the best education in those four years.

content.Placements: 100% placement guarantee is available in many courses, especially in nursing. We can directly work in the Himalayan Hospital, which is their own, and gain experience. Even after getting registration in the nursing council, we can apply to other hospitals too. There are 100 students in my batch. The lowest package offered is 3.6 LPA. The highest package is offered according to experience and more qualifications, like a master's in nursing, NPCC, PhD, etc. We can also clear IELTS exams and apply for other hospitals in foreign countries. There are 100% placements in the Himalayan Hospital, but that depends on students' performance in the interview.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is the best nursing college in Uttarakhand.

content.Placements: All eligible students have an opportunity to get admission in our course. There is a huge hospital for training and internship for all the students. Minimum Rs 15,000 - Rs 20,000 salary offered after getting the job in a private hospital and in government hospital. The maximum salary is Rs 50,000 - Rs 60,000.
content.Infrastructure: There is a huge nursing college for quality studies. Big classrooms, lecture theatre, and projectors for learning are available. Labs and library are also available for the students. Hostel rooms are good and comfortable. Food quality is also good in mess and canteen. There is also a huge opportunity in sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall average, not bad.

content.Placements: Placements in the engineering college are moderate. Students who put in personal effort usually get placed. This year, highest salary package offered is around 5 LPA, as far as I know. Opportunities exist, but mostly for the self-driven. Overall, it's average.
content.Infrastructure: If we talk specifically about the engineering college, the infrastructure is more moderate in scale. Classrooms are well-maintained and equipped with essential facilities such as benches, whiteboards, fans, and projectors, which are suitable for regular academic use. Library is small in size considering the number of students enrolled. Computer lab facilities are one of the better aspects of the infrastructure. There is one large lab that can accommodate around 60 students and five smaller labs, each with a capacity of 30.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: If you want to choose nursing, this college is the best.

content.Placements: All students get placement after completing the course. The highest salary is around Rs. 50,000 per month. The lowest is Rs. 15,000 per month. All students get internships in our course at our college. This course has a 100% placement guarantee and job security.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a huge building with advanced lecture theatres with projectors. There is a large auditorium, simulation labs, and a central library for students. Hostel is well-maintained with clean rooms. The food provided in the mess and canteen is good and hygienic. There are multiple courts and a university ground for games in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Best nursing college in Uttarakhand.

content.Placements: Almost all students get placement in our university hospital after completion of the course. The minimum salary is Rs. 15,000 and increases with experience. All students get internships at our hospital, which is the best hospital in Dehradun.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms and auditorium are large, with simulation labs, projectors, and a university library with computers for students. The mess is good and hygienic. There is a university ground and courts for matches, along with good medical facilities.

admission_overview.title: SRHU Dehradun Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Swami Rama Himalayan University (SRHU), Dehradun admission is both merit-based and entrance-based. The University provides higher education across several streams. SRHU has collaborations with several universities across the globe like IIT Roorkee, IBC International Business School Denmark, Laurea University of Applied Sciences Finland, Rostock University Germany, AIIMS, etc. Recognised by the UGC, the university offers over 100 full-time UG, PG, diploma, certificate, and doctoral courses in Engineering, Management, Biosciences, Yoga Sciences, Nursing, Paramedical, Epidemiology, Clinical Research, and Hospital Administration.

paragraphs: TheSRHU admission processvaries from course to course. The candidates must begin their process by meeting the course-specific eligibility criteria followed by filling out the application form available on the SRHU official website. The admission criteria followed by SRHU are merit-based for some courses and entrance-based for other courses.
The complete step-wiseSRHU admission process 2025is given below:

SRHU Application Process 2025:The SRHU application form 2025 is released on the official website of the University. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria are required to apply for their desired and pay the required SRHU application fee.

SRHU Selection Process 2025:The SRHU admission criteria for its courses is either merit-based or entrance-based. The University shortlists candidates based on their performance in qualifying exam/ national-level entrance exam. After shortlisting, a merit-list is released on the official website with the names of the selected candidates.
SRHU Final Admission 2025:Selected candidates are required to pay the seat acceptance fee and complete the document verification process before the stipulated deadline.

faqs.question: Is Swami Rama Himalayan University good or bad for placements?
faqs.answer: The 2024 placement report is yet to be released officially. However, the University has disclosed the NIRF report 2024, incorporating the 2023 placement data. Out of 83 PG (3-year) graduates 79 were placed during the 2023 drive. Check the complete insights of SRHU placements from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Total students (PG-3 year) 83 Students placed (PG-3 year) 79 Median package (PG-3 year) INR 19.36 LPA NOTE: The above details are gathered from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: What is the highest placement package offered at Swami Rama Himalayan University?
faqs.answer: The 2023 median package is available for PG (3-year) Medical courses only. Looking at the past three years' statistics, an improving trend was recorded in the PG (3-year) Medical median package. The median package offered to MBBS students also increased from 2021 to 2022. The following table presents SRHU placement package trends: Course Median Package (2021) Median Package (2022) Median Package (2023) MBBS INR 10.60 LPA INR 11.66 LPA N/A PG (3-year) Medical INR 15.60 LPA INR 17.60 LPA INR 19.36 LPA NOTE: The above salary data is fetched from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: How well do students rate B.Sc placements at SRHU?
faqs.answer: BSc students who reviewed SRHU on Shiksha.com gave an average rating of 4 out of 5 to BSc placements across various specialisations. The following observations on BSc placements can be drawn from SRHU reviews available on Shiksha.com: The placement rate is 80% and the average package is around INR 4.5 LPA There is no placement support for BSc in Yoga Science & Holistic Health. 100% of students got internships in the university's Himalayan Hospital BSc (Nursing) students are placed in different organisations like Kailash hospital, Max Hospital, Himalayan Hospital, etc.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at SRHU Dehradun?
faqs.answer: The MBA fee at SRHU is different for the All India Category (AIC) and the Permanent Resident of Uttarakhand (PRU) category. The total tuition fee for MBA students under the All India Category is INR 3.2 lakh. The tuition fee for Permanent Residents of Uttarakhand is INR 2.37 lakh for two years. The one-time fees included in the fee structure are the same for both categories. The total one-time fee payable by MBA students at SRHU is INR 21,500. It must be noted that the mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: Is B.Pharma fee at SRHU same for all semesters?
faqs.answer: No, the fees for all eight semesters of SRHU's BPharma programme is not the same. This is because the students have to pay certain one-time charges during the first and the sixth semester of the programme, in addition to the semesterly installment of the tuition fee and the examination fee. The one-time charges payable during the first semester include the enrollment fee, security deposit and the admission fee. During the sixth semester, students have to pay an Industry visit fee of INR 10,000. The following table presents the semesterly fee payable by AIC and PRU category candidates admitted to the BPharma programme of SRHU: Semester AIC PRU Fee to be paid in First Semester INR 92,700 INR 75,800 Fee to be paid in Other Semesters INR 69,000 INR 52,100 Fee to be paid in Sixth Semester INR 79,000 INR 62,100 NOTE: The mentioned fees have been sourced from the official website of the university. They are still subject to change and hence, are indicative.
tables: Fee to be paid in First Semester
Fee to be paid in Other Semesters

faqs.question: What is the total fee for B.Pharma at SRHU?
faqs.answer: The total BPharma fee at SRHU is different for the All India Category (AIC) and the Permanent Resident of Uttarakhand (PRU) category. The total tuition fee for BPharma students under the All India Category is INR 5.2 lakh. The tuition fee for Permanent Residents of Uttarakhand is INR 3.85 lakh for four years. Other components included in the total fee are one-time fees (cumulative of multiple components), examination fees, etc. The total programme fee for AIC candidates is INR 5.86 lakh. For the Permanent Residents of Uttarakhand, the total BPharma fee is INR 4.51 lakh. It must be noted that the mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for B.Sc course at SRHU?
faqs.answer: The BSc tuition fees SRHU range between INR 60,000 and INR 5.6 lakh for the entire course duration. The exact amount depends on the choice of specialisation. The university also provides a fee concession on the tuition fee to the Permanent Residents of Uttarakhand (PRU) category. However, the one-time fees inlcuded in the course curriculum are the same for All India Category and PRU category candidates. The mentioned fee has been sourced from the university's official website. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

hostel.description:
Accommodation is next best to home. Our residential facilities provide an environment to enhance students personal abilities, besides, living together, living independently and enriching understanding of various facets of life journey through analytical, philosophical discussions etc. 

University has separate hostel for girls and boys pursuing Medical programs. Additionally, residential facilities, though limited, are available to students pursuing Management / Engineering programs on first come first basis.

library.description:
Central Library of the University fosters environment for Learning & Teaching. It is a quiet place to study and research. Established in 1992, Central Library is spread over the area of 2400 square meters with 425 seating capacity.  It has now completed 25 years with its monograph collection at more than 30,000, foreign journals (mostly e-journals) and 119 Indian Journals. It also subscribes to two databases i.e. J-Gate and EBSCO Business Source Elite that contains more than 600 full text journals.  

With internet facility, students also have access to over 4 Lakhs books through World Class Library.  Besides, Library services are also provided through four faculty library centers which are located at the Medical Institute, Management School, School of Engineering & Technology and Nursing College.

college_info.college_name: SRHU Dehradun Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The SRHU scholarships & fee concessions for the Admission in different categories are as follows:

The MBA fee at SRHU is different for the All India Category (AIC) and the Permanent Resident of Uttarakhand (PRU) category. The total tuition fee for MBA students under the All India Category is INR 3.2 lakh. The tuition fee for Permanent Residents of Uttarakhand is INR 2.37 lakh for two years. The one-time fees included in the fee structure are the same for both categories. The total one-time fee payable by MBA students at SRHU is INR 21,500. It must be noted that the mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

The total BPharma fee at SRHU is different for the All India Category (AIC) and the Permanent Resident of Uttarakhand (PRU) category. The total tuition fee for BPharma students under the All India Category is INR 5.2 lakh. The tuition fee for Permanent Residents of Uttarakhand is INR 3.85 lakh for four years. Other components included in the total fee are one-time fees (cumulative of multiple components), examination fees, etc. The total programme fee for AIC candidates is INR 5.86 lakh. For the Permanent Residents of Uttarakhand, the total BPharma fee is INR 4.51 lakh. It must be noted that the mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

The BSc tuition fees SRHU range between INR 60,000 and INR 5.6 lakh for the entire course duration. The exact amount depends on the choice of specialisation. The university also provides a fee concession on the tuition fee to the Permanent Residents of Uttarakhand (PRU) category. However, the one-time fees inlcuded in the course curriculum are the same for All India Category and PRU category candidates. The mentioned fee has been sourced from the university's official website. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.
faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?

faqs.answer: A:    The salary for BTech Petroleum Engineering freshers in India depends on a lot of factors like academic record, skill set, internship experience, company location, etc. Initially, you can get approximately INR 4 LPA to INR 6 LPA after completing the BTech Petroleum Engg. course. As you earn a few years of experience in the field, you can easily earn between INR 6 LPA and INR 10 LPA at the mid-senior level. For senior-level positions, the salary can go up to INR 15 LPA. Recruiters pay more to people who have the right set of skills and experience and help in their business growth.Know more about -Petroleum Engineering Courses

overview_faqs.question: What is the average starting salary for BTech Petroleum Engineering graduates?
overview_faqs.answer: The salary for BTech Petroleum Engineering freshers in India depends on a lot of factors like academic record, skill set, internship experience, company location, etc. Initially, you can get approximately INR 4 LPA to INR 6 LPA after completing the BTech Petroleum Engg. course. As you earn a few years of experience in the field, you can easily earn between INR 6 LPA and INR 10 LPA at the mid-senior level. For senior-level positions, the salary can go up to INR 15 LPA. Recruiters pay more to people who have the right set of skills and experience and help in their business growth.Know more about -Petroleum Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: Khaja Bandanawaz University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best college of Gulbarga.

content.Placements: Any student who has passed in PUC or Diploma can join this university; no percentage is fixed. There are no placement facilities in this university, and no companies are hiring from this university because they don't provide placements to students. The placements are poor.
content.Infrastructure: The university has hostels for boys and girls, but the boys' hostel has a decent building, and the girls' hostel has a great building. In the boys' hostel, they don't have proper washrooms, and the cost of the hostel food is average, but good quality food is provided by the university.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities but not satisfied by faculty.

content.Placements: There are no placement programs or offers from the college for students yet. The campus is on-going vast development and we hope it also provides placement facilities in the upcoming years.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Khaja Bandanawaz University is absolutely mind-blowing. The university campus is spread over 50 acres of land. It has a gym and a garden for relaxation. The campus is very cold because of the huge trees. The classrooms are also very good.
content.Faculty: The teachers at this college are very knowledgeable and helpful. They are qualified doctors, and the teaching quality is above average. The semester exams are easy to difficult based on the learner, and the pass percentage is 85-90%.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am very much dissatisfied .

content.Placements: 98% of students were placed in my course. The highest package will be of 90,000 and the lowest package will be 68,000. I don't know about it, but we have alumni with best company profiles, etc. And recruitment will depend on only the students hard work, passion and abilities. 86% of students will get internships before the start of 7th semester. Build a website, create a mobile application, do some coding, and more.
content.Infrastructure: We have the best classrooms with the best infrastructure. We have different labs with all the facilities, like computers and hardware parts. In college, every year there will be sports events organized by the management and we have an open area for basketball, cricket, football and all. We also have canteen but there will be only drinks and some snacks, not dal and price. I hope it will be on the on the menu.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college has a green campus with great teachers, but the hostel needs to be improved.

content.Placements: As a medical college, they do not have any placements like that of engineering colleges, but clinical practices have helped a lot. Practical knowledge and the internship programme helps us to understand the patients. As we are 161 members, all my seniors have got internships in the college itself.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is a waste. There are no basic amenities in the hostel. But apart for the hostel, the campus is very beautiful and full of greenery. There is no Wi-Fi. The canteen is average having less items on the menu. Good medical facilities are available while the sports activities are still developing. Games are held every year on a university level.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied by the faculty of teaching and hostel.

content.Placements: Approximately 80 percent of strength is in computer Science. The highest is 150000, and the average is 75000, the lowest is 65000. not sure about the companies.85 percent of students got internship in different companies. Top roles in my course, data analysis. Coder. App developer. Web developer. Etc.
content.Infrastructure: There is a very good library, but they have old edition of the books. And they do not provide the students with the books. Hostel is very good, with clean and hygiene maintenance. Food is excellent with hygiene. They provide you with tea three time in a day. Breakfast is made early and served.

faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?
faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law.To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear theAll India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

hostel_campus.college_name: Khaja Bandanawaz University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Best college of Gulbarga.
reviews.review_text: The university has hostels for boys and girls, but the boys' hostel has a decent building, and the girls' hostel has a great building. In the boys' hostel, they don't have proper washrooms, and the cost of the hostel food is average, but good quality food is provided by the university.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities but not satisfied by faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Khaja Bandanawaz University is absolutely mind-blowing. The university campus is spread over 50 acres of land. It has a gym and a garden for relaxation. The campus is very cold because of the huge trees. The classrooms are also very good.

reviews.review_heading: I am very much dissatisfied .
reviews.review_text: We have the best classrooms with the best infrastructure. We have different labs with all the facilities, like computers and hardware parts. In college, every year there will be sports events organized by the management and we have an open area for basketball, cricket, football and all. We also have canteen but there will be only drinks and some snacks, not dal and price. I hope it will be on the on the menu.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a green campus with great teachers, but the hostel needs to be improved.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is a waste. There are no basic amenities in the hostel. But apart for the hostel, the campus is very beautiful and full of greenery. There is no Wi-Fi. The canteen is average having less items on the menu. Good medical facilities are available while the sports activities are still developing. Games are held every year on a university level.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied by the faculty of teaching and hostel.
reviews.review_text: There is a very good library, but they have old edition of the books. And they do not provide the students with the books. Hostel is very good, with clean and hygiene maintenance. Food is excellent with hygiene. They provide you with tea three time in a day. Breakfast is made early and served.

reviews.review_heading: The college is decent to get a degree.
reviews.review_text: The college has very poor infrastructure. The road is bad for a long time. Currently, it is getting renovated after becoming an autonomous college. The college does not provide Wi-Fi facility. The library is old. In the classrooms, there are pigeons. There is no proper parking area.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Khaja Banda Nawaz College of Engineering, Gulbarga.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average, and it could be good enough as it becomes a university now. It should have good infrastructure, but it is average for now. The college does not provide Wi-Fi facility and labs. Central and department library is available for the students. It provides a paid hostel facility for students. Mess and canteen are available. Games facilities are not available.

reviews.review_heading: Kbn university absolutely good faculty of biotechnology in 2023.
reviews.review_text:
-Everything is available Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms. Classrooms are good
Wi-Fi is available always
Labs are good and some instruments are not there
-There is no hostel facility
May be now they will provide hostel facility 
During our time there was no hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to study in but not for enjoyment.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi hotspot is enabled in the college for college students for coding and much more. Many las are available for courses like Physics, Chemistry, Computer Science, electronics and electricals. Library is also available in the college. Students do not eat in canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college is surrounded by lush greenery. Our labs are good. The library is good. The canteen is available. The gym is good. Sports are played every week, and many sports events are organised.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: Labs are available in our college. The infrastructure of our college is not good. Our college has a good library where students can study without any disturbance. Many books are available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: There is no campus placements .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the engineering college is quite below average, buildings are more than 30 years old and the roads to the departments are just even wrost. The library, laboratories, and classrooms are big. The hostel is average. The canteen is good. Medical facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the environment.
reviews.review_text:
College have Wi-Fi and well structured and well experienced staff and there is an average classrooms and library is large and well maintained.
Hostel is good and mess food needs to be improved and canteen food is better.
There is medical facilities available in college .

reviews.review_heading: Our college and faculty members are excellent, and they provide all the things.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was superb, and the food was excellent. Warden sir was good. The library was very good, and many books were available. Quality of food was excellent, and they provide different weekly varieties. There is nothing to worry about food. Rooms were excellent, and the total infrastructure was also good.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive environment, great infrastructure, but no placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure with excellent lab and classroom facilities and strong Wi-Fi. However, the library lacks proper books and access. There's no hostel for engineering students. The canteen food is good, and the college provides great sports facilities.
