review_summary.college_name: Katuri Medical College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Katuri Medical College and Hospital .

content.Placements: Placements are not offered in our college. The foundation for our PG preparation is sound, and faculty help us through our journey. An internship must be done for one year in the hospital associated with college. A single batch has a size of 150 members in a class.
content.Infrastructure: Labs, classroom, and library, where all basic amenities are present. Gym, sports ground for cricket basketball, badminton, and throwball. hostel food is average. The canteen also has good food. Medical facilities are obviously provided whenever needed.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Katuri Medical College.

content.Placements: There are no placements as such, but the college offers a year of internship in the final year for more clinical exposure. Students are paid for this internship, which provides valuable experience for their future practice. Hospital visits start from the second professional year.
content.Infrastructure: The college has all necessary facilities, including labs and hostels. However, the maintenance of these facilities is not up to the mark; the hostels often stink and are not worth the premium. There is also a bus facility for students from nearby areas.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I would totally recommend the college.

content.Placements: The top roles may vary from anesthesiologist and general surgeon, specialisations, dean, general medicine doctor, advanced super specialists etc. Almost 75-85% of students get internships. The highest package might be approximately 20 lakhs per annum, and the minimum is 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: It is a well-developed college with good infrastructure. Our chairman made sure that all the equipment in both the college and hospital were to be advanced so that every student and doctor will get to know about them, and the patients can get a high quality treatment.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied until now because of staff members and way of teaching from 2017 to until now.

content.Placements: About 80% of the students will pass out every year from our college. Placements are good here, and many students qualified in NEET PG with better marks. The number of outpatients is increasing every year. All the students doing internships in our college are getting a stipend of around Rs. 2,000-3,000 every month.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel hospitality is very good, but it has to improve food quality. The canteen is available in between boys and girls hostel. There is a canteen in the hospital 24x7, and ATM facility is also available for students. Roads inside the college are awesome.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure, decent faculty and facilities.

content.Placements: Around 50% of the students got placed in the first attempt after internships. The highest package offered is around 1 Lac per month, and the lowest salary is around Rs. 30,000 per month depending on the branch of PG. Mostly, private medical colleges or hospitals offer placements. After completing MBBS, everyone does a 1-year internship. Junior doctor and resident doctor roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is present in the library only. Labs are neat and adequate for the course. Classrooms are digitalized. The library is good with many books and journals. I am not a hostler, but as per my friends, the hostel is average. Mess becomes routine after few days, but the breakfast is good. Medical facilities are excellent. You can play many sports if you are a hosteler.

review_content.General: There is no concept of placements as it is a medical college. The next step after graduation is PG entrance preparation for many graduates. Others who applied for jobs did not face any problems. The postgraduation in this college is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are good with all essential facilities. The canteen is of good quality and accessible. There are 2 messes, and both are good. There are sports like basketball, badminton, table tennis, and swimming. It has a well-equipped gym along with a sauna.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: There is high demand for doctors in our country so students will have a good package as it is on our knowledge as an example, the minimum salary pacakge offered is 14 LPA. All of our seniors get internships, and they do government jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is best. It has Wi-Fi in the library, quality of the mess is good, and the canteen is just near to hostel. It has a big sports complex in which a series of games are available to play. It provides the best hostel facilities, and it feels like living in house. The hospital also provides students treatment free of cost.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because of the infrastructure, but it does not provide a hostel facility for boys.

review_content.Placements: I am in the 3rd year, so I don't know very well about the placements. I think our college provides good placements. The highest salary package offered to the students is 10.5 LPA, and to achieve this placement, you have to be good at studies and obtain great marks. Many companies like Cipla, Macleods, etc., visit our college for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is almost good. I will rate 5 stars if I am doing an MBBS course. I am doing a pharmacy course, and the infrastructure is well-maintained but not good compare to MBBS colleges. Classrooms are well-maintained and very hygienic. It contains a projector for teaching and presentation. Labs are quite good, but it is not well-maintained. The library is awesome, and it has a study room too. The hostel facility is available only for girls. Boys live in separate PGs, which is 900-1000 meters far from college.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. Vithalrao Vikhe Patil Foundations Medical College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My dream college life with the college. My dream is to reach the ultimate dream of my life.

content.Placements: The students in your class have a strength of 200, after MBBS you don't worry about placements as you will definitely get a job as a medical officer or you can also work as a private practitioner. Truth to told no one stops just on graduation. Nowadays as everyone prepares for NEET PG ahead, so if you are thinking about pursuing an MBBS then be prepared for this, because it has been a competitive field recently.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is top quality on all the campus. The instrument availability is really good in all the laboratories. The library has sufficient books for all students. The campus is definitely the best one for me. It is my campus that really attracted me when I first visited my college. About the hostel recently we have been shifted to a new hostel which is not less than a society having the strength to occupy nearby 2000 students, with availability of separate bathrooms for each room, and two students per room.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a good medical college with all the essential facilities.

content.Placements: There is no concept of placements as it is a medical college. The next step after graduation is PG entrance preparation for many graduates. Others who applied for jobs did not face any problems. The postgraduation in this college is good.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are good with all essential facilities. The canteen is of good quality and accessible. There are 2 messes, and both are good. There are sports like basketball, badminton, table tennis, and swimming. It has a well-equipped gym along with a sauna.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: There is high demand for doctors in our country so students will have a good package as it is on our knowledge as an example, the minimum salary pacakge offered is 14 LPA. All of our seniors get internships, and they do government jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is best. It has Wi-Fi in the library, quality of the mess is good, and the canteen is just near to hostel. It has a big sports complex in which a series of games are available to play. It provides the best hostel facilities, and it feels like living in house. The hospital also provides students treatment free of cost.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of the infrastructure, but it does not provide a hostel facility for boys.

content.Placements: I am in the 3rd year, so I don't know very well about the placements. I think our college provides good placements. The highest salary package offered to the students is 10.5 LPA, and to achieve this placement, you have to be good at studies and obtain great marks. Many companies like Cipla, Macleods, etc., visit our college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is almost good. I will rate 5 stars if I am doing an MBBS course. I am doing a pharmacy course, and the infrastructure is well-maintained but not good compare to MBBS colleges. Classrooms are well-maintained and very hygienic. It contains a projector for teaching and presentation. Labs are quite good, but it is not well-maintained. The library is awesome, and it has a study room too. The hostel facility is available only for girls. Boys live in separate PGs, which is 900-1000 meters far from college.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 1. all the students are placed as the Dr patient ratio is high in India 2. All the students do internship as it is a art of the course 3. There are may opportunities after MBBS as one can pursue post graduation, Practice in a hospital or pursue a career in health administration.
content.Infrastructure: 1. DWPF's medical college is equipped with 500 bedded multi speciality hospital, Whole campus has 24*7 Wi-Fi, 5 lecture halls which have capacity of 150+ each. 2. The quality of food is good, immediate medical care is available The college is also equipped with a sports complex with lawn tennis courts, badminton courts, basketball court, Olympic size swimming pool along with indoor recreational activities like table tennis, carom and a fully equipped men's and women's gym.

reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with faculty, really good infrastructure, facilities, etc.

review_content.Placements: This is a government medical college so no packages are offered here. No one recruiting us. Internship done at our college, not one company hired us. We go to the hospital, and do duty for approximately 12 hours in different departments just as pediatrics, PSM, ENT, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Dr. Shankarrao's college infrastructure is good. In the college a separate library is available. In the library, enough space is available for students. For different batches different classrooms and labs are available. Proper lights are available here. No Wi-Fi is available here.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Just go for it. The college is entirely different from what it used to be 3 years ago.

review_content.Placements: After completing the course you need to do 1 year rural service (relaxable in some items) as a bond (signed with state government. ). After that you can freely join any private hospital or government hospital or prepare for higher studies. Considering serious shortage of doctors in country placement is not a problem.
review_content.Infrastructure: Talking about infrastructure there is a brand new college building for preclinical subjects and a very big hospital. There is a common library for boys and girls. Separate hostel for boys and girls of UG courses and separate hostel for PG courses. Mess is within each hostel with decent quality of food and service. Also foundation is laid for new UG boys hostel within the campus in early 2022.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. Shankarrao Chavan Government Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really a good college to take admission into for MBBS.

content.Placements: As a professional medical course, there are a lot of chances of getting placed as if the person is well educated and trained. It depends on an individual as to how much he will earn. A person can even earn more by acquiring specific degrees in any field of medicine .
content.Infrastructure: The college building is really good, as it's newly built. Classrooms are well maintained. The library has a good Wi-Fi facility but it's not an AC one. Hostel occupancy still remains a problem and the infrastructure is not that good. Overall, campus is good and green .

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college in terms of infrastructure and academics.

content.Placements: More than 80% of students got placed in this course. Top recruiting company is Medanta Medcity. Almost 100% of students got internships in this course. Top roles offered are MD medicine, MD anesthesia, MS surgery, etc.
content.Infrastructure: All basic facilities are available in this college. There is a decent library on our campus. Classrooms are well-maintained. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Hostel is decent. There is a big playground. A volleyball court is also available. We have a gymkhana in this college. The food served in the mess is decent. Medical facilities are good. The security facility is good in this college.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with faculty, really good infrastructure, facilities, etc.

content.Placements: This is a government medical college so no packages are offered here. No one recruiting us. Internship done at our college, not one company hired us. We go to the hospital, and do duty for approximately 12 hours in different departments just as pediatrics, PSM, ENT, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Dr. Shankarrao's college infrastructure is good. In the college a separate library is available. In the library, enough space is available for students. For different batches different classrooms and labs are available. Proper lights are available here. No Wi-Fi is available here.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Just go for it. The college is entirely different from what it used to be 3 years ago.

content.Placements: After completing the course you need to do 1 year rural service (relaxable in some items) as a bond (signed with state government. ). After that you can freely join any private hospital or government hospital or prepare for higher studies. Considering serious shortage of doctors in country placement is not a problem.
content.Infrastructure: Talking about infrastructure there is a brand new college building for preclinical subjects and a very big hospital. There is a common library for boys and girls. Separate hostel for boys and girls of UG courses and separate hostel for PG courses. Mess is within each hostel with decent quality of food and service. Also foundation is laid for new UG boys hostel within the campus in early 2022.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Dr. Shankarrao Chavan Government Medical College.

content.Placements: Students get placed through NEET UG exam. The stipend offered during the internships is very low, i.e., Rs. 5,800. No such placement cell is available in the college. Intern students are doing the jobs of clerks which is not much good. Faculty members are biased.
content.Infrastructure: There are no facilities like Wi-Fi, hostel or canteen. Quality of infrastructure is okay. Food available in the hostel mess is according to the state Maharashtra. So, it is a problem for students who are from other states. The hostel doesn't have proper sanitation. A cafeteria is available for hostelers.

college_info.intro:
Sanjay Ghodawat University Kolhapur has a total of 10 schools of study, including Mgmt, Eng, Design, Media, Social Science, & others. The university has a wide range of courses at the UG & PG levels across diff. streams. MBA, BBA, & BTech are among the most popular programmes available at the university.
Sanjay Ghodawat University offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programmes offered at the university cover core courses in the areas of Aeronautical Eng, Civil Eng, Electronics & Communication Eng, Computer Science & Eng, & AI & ML.
The MBA programme offered by the SGU Kolhapur is a 2-year course. It is offered in specialisations, including IB, Financial, HR, Marketing, & Operation & Supply Chain. Below are the Sanjay Ghodawat University's popular programmes:

overview_faqs.question: Does Sanjay Ghodawat University refund fees?
overview_faqs.answer: After receiving duly signed admission cancellation request letter from the candidate as per schedule published by the Sanjay Ghodawat University, the University shall cancel the admission immediately. The refund of fees on or before cut-off date of admission declared by the Sanjay Ghodawat University, shall be made within two days i.e. total fee minus the processing charges of Rs.1,000/-, or refund rule shall be as per the guidelines of the appropriate authorities or the State Government, as the case may be. If the admission is cancelled after the cut-off date of the admission declared by the Sanjay Ghodawat University, there shall be no refund except the Security Deposit and Caution Money Deposit.Thanks

review_summary.college_name: Sanjay Ghodawat University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college has great learning environment with supportive faculty.

content.Placements: A good percentage is required, but a student with good skills is more important in my opinion. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Students having good knowledge of problem-solving can pass the interviews. There are many roles offered, but it's up to us what we prefer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is too good and beautiful. The hostel is clean and great. Infrastructure consists of a lake, trees, gardens, statues, and much more. There is free Wi-Fi, clean labs, and larger classrooms. The library consists of different types of books. It has been a great experience.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Inside Sanjay Ghodawat University - SGU.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placed in our course is about 25%. The highest package offered is 6 LPA. The average package is 2 LPA. The lowest package offered is 1.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Cipla, Sun Pharma, Dr. Reddy's Laboratories, Lupin, etc. About 20% of students get internships from our course in Reddy's Laboratories and Lupin. Top role offered is junior pharmacist.
content.Infrastructure: Good facilities are available for our course and world-class infrastructure is built. The campus is very attractive and clean. Wi-Fi is available on the campus for free. Laboratories are well-equipped. Big classrooms are available. There is a big library also present. In the hostel, there are 4 students in one room and two fans are available in each room. Hostel mess food quality is not so good compared to the price they charge for one month which is Rs 3,500 for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Medical facilities are available on campus. Sports ground is so big and lots of games and competitions are held.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty members but they should change the teaching manner.

content.Placements: A little smaller amount of students get placements. The highest package is 6 LPA. The lowest package is 1.2 LPA. There are very less companies that come to college for campus selection and choose the students wisely by taking few tests and not taking them only through their marks.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is very good and tidy. They clean the college regularly. No one can enter without an ID card the keepers of the college. The hostel is supportive. They keep supporting students when they need their help and give them the necessary essential.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good facilities and infrastructure.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in my college is about up to 84%, approximately and the average package is 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, and Infosys and there are other companies like Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, and other companies.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are available in the hostel like well-maintained rooms, purified water, good-ventilated rooms, and hot water facilities. Wi-Fi facility is also available and also there are mess and canteen facilities on campus. Medical facilities, indoor and outdoor sports facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Loved the campus life and colleagues.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who got placed in my course or program is not clearly specified. Some information is there about placements that approximately 88% of students got internships. Top requirement companies are Microsoft, Google, Infosys, Tata, Wipro, and many more. It is not clearly specified.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure for my department are normally good with well-equipped classrooms featuring modern equipment, smart labs, and a well-stocked library. The quality of facilities of the hostel is good. There is a mess hall that provides good food.

admission_overview.college_name: Sanjay Ghodawat University Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

paragraphs: Sanjay Ghodawat University (SGU) offers more than 60 undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programmes in Technology, Architecture, Commerce & Management, Science, Computer Science & Applications, Liberal Arts, and Pharmaceutical Sciences. SGU accepts the applications in the online mode. Admission to various courses at the university is merit-based or entrance exam-based.

Apart from these courses, the university also provides financial support to students basis their academic merit and entrance exam scores. Also, SGU provides several job opportunities to students across various courses through campus placement drives where recruiters like Amazon, ICICI Bank, Infosys, and Wipro participate.

Merit in the last qualifying examination is the basic eligibility for various undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programmes offered at Sanjay Ghodawat University. However, admission to these courses is based on the scores obtained by the candidates in national, state, or university-level entrance exams. The table below lists various courses offered at SGU along with their application status, eligibility, and fee details:
Class 12 with 45% aggregate
JEE/ MHTCET/PERA CET
Class 12 with PCM/ Diploma
NATA/ JEE Main Paper II
Bachelor's degree with 50% aggregate
CAT/MAT/XAT/ GMAT/ATMA/CMAT/ PERA CET
Class 12 with 45% aggregate
NEET/MHTCET
BE/ BTech with 45% aggregate
GATE/ PERA CET
BCA or equivalent degree with 50% aggregate
MAH-MCA-CET
Bachelor's degree from a recognised university
Master's degree

The admission procedure for Sanjay Ghodawat University involves multiple steps, such as appearing for the accepted entrance exam, application, selection, counselling, and admission confirmation. Students seeking admission must fulfil all of the required admission criteria before applying. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailedSanjay Ghodawat University admissions process:
Step 1: Sanjay Ghodawat University Application Process 2025

Sanjay Ghodawat University's admission processstarts with the application process. Candidates can download the application process from the university's official website. The duly filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at Sanjay Ghodawat University. However, the application and entrance test fee will be paid online and candidates have to attach the pay slip along with the two copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to all the UG and PG courses at Sanjay Ghodawat University is entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for either university-level or state-level entrance exams such as SGUPET for the selection of respective courses.
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates have to appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount of fee to secure their seats.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

placement_data.title: Sanjay Ghodawat University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered to Engineering students during Sanjay Ghodawat University placements 2025 stood at INR 36 LPA and INR 3.20 LPA, respectively. Further, the highest and average package offered to Management students of the batch 2025 stood at INR 12 LPA and INR 4.25 LPA, respectively. The highest and average package offered to the Pharmacy batch 2025 stood at INR 4.6 LPA and INR 3 LPA, respectively.

Earlier, the 2024 placements at Sanjay Ghodawat University have successfully concluded with 212 students placed. In addition to this, the NIRF report 2024 has also been released. As per the report, the median package offered to the BTech and MTech students during the 2023 drive stood at INR 3.60 LPA and INR 4 LPA, respectively. For MBA courses, the 2023 median package stood at INR 4 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the median package offered at Sanjay Ghodawat University?
faqs.answer: The median package offered to the 2023 passing-out BTech and MTech students was INR 3.60 LPA and INR 4 LPA, respectively. For the MBA batch, the median package stood at INR 4 LPA. Take a look at the table below to know the Sanjay Ghodawat University median package 2023: Course Median Package (2023) BTech INR 3.60 LPA MTech INR 4 LPA MBA INR 4 LPA NOTE: The above salary details are gathered from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: Does Sanjay Ghodawat University refund fees?
faqs.answer: After receiving duly signed admission cancellation request letter from the candidate as per schedule published by the Sanjay Ghodawat University, the University shall cancel the admission immediately. The refund of fees on or before cut-off date of admission declared by the Sanjay Ghodawat University, shall be made within two days i.e. total fee minus the processing charges of Rs.1,000/-, or refund rule shall be as per the guidelines of the appropriate authorities or the State Government, as the case may be. If the admission is cancelled after the cut-off date of the admission declared by the Sanjay Ghodawat University, there shall be no refund except the Security Deposit and Caution Money Deposit. Thanks

faqs.question: Does SGU offer better placements than KIT's IMER?
faqs.answer: Yes, SGU offer better placements than KIT's IMER. Placement rates at SGU are reportedly above 90% for a several of programmes, including the MBA and B.Tech. Depending on the programme and area of expertise, the average package ranges from INR 3.10 LPA to 5.50 LPA. Their success is attributed to their strong industry connections and specialised placement cell. Over 80% of students who applied to KIT's IMER were placed. A package typically costs between INR 3 and 4 LPA. In general, KIT's IMER fees are less than those at SGU.The market demand may favour some specialisations within a programme over others in terms of placement opportunities. It is advisable to compare information from the most recent reports for both universities, as placement data can vary from year to year.

faqs.question: Does Sanjay Ghodawat University have good placements?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sanjay Ghodawat University has a good placement history. Around 85% of students got placed at reputable companies like Tata Motors, L&T, and TCS. The university gave its students an average annual package of Rs 3.25 lakh in 2022; the lowest package was Rs 2.5 lakh. In the same year, MBA candidates received offers of a median package worth INR 3.80 lakh annually on average. In contrast to the previous year, there was a slight decrease in the number of students placed in 2023—roughly 35% fewer students were chosen. Furthermore, there were around 8% fewer organizations visiting for placements.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sanjay Ghodawat University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college has great learning environment with supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is too good and beautiful. The hostel is clean and great. Infrastructure consists of a lake, trees, gardens, statues, and much more. There is free Wi-Fi, clean labs, and larger classrooms. The library consists of different types of books. It has been a great experience.

reviews.review_heading: Inside Sanjay Ghodawat University - SGU.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities are available for our course and world-class infrastructure is built. The campus is very attractive and clean. Wi-Fi is available on the campus for free. Laboratories are well-equipped. Big classrooms are available. There is a big library also present. In the hostel, there are 4 students in one room and two fans are available in each room. Hostel mess food quality is not so good compared to the price they charge for one month which is Rs 3,500 for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Me...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members but they should change the teaching manner.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very good and tidy. They clean the college regularly. No one can enter without an ID card the keepers of the college. The hostel is supportive. They keep supporting students when they need their help and give them the necessary essential.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are available in the hostel like well-maintained rooms, purified water, good-ventilated rooms, and hot water facilities. Wi-Fi facility is also available and also there are mess and canteen facilities on campus. Medical facilities, indoor and outdoor sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Loved the campus life and colleagues.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure for my department are normally good with well-equipped classrooms featuring modern equipment, smart labs, and a well-stocked library. The quality of facilities of the hostel is good. There is a mess hall that provides good food.

reviews.review_heading: Good environmental conditions and suitable situations.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my CSE program is excellent, with well-equipped classrooms and a well-stocked library offering both physical and digital resources. Hostel facilities are equally impressive, providing comfortable, well-ventilated rooms, clean common areas, a dedicated study space, and a decent mess that serves a variety of nutritious meals. Overall, it is good.

reviews.review_heading: Nice environment and greenery
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my CSE program is excellent, with well-equipped classrooms and a well-stocked library offering both physical and digital resources. Hostel facilities are equally impressive, providing comfortable, well-ventilated rooms, clean common areas, a dedicated study space, and a decent mess that serves a variety of nutritious meals.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course is good, with well-equipped classrooms featuring modern projectors and smart boards, a well-stocked library, water pressure, and a mess hall that could improve. We also have a variety of food and there is a food court.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with the management, but the infrastructure and facilities worth the admission fee.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Well-maintained classrooms, labs, and the library are the major attractions of our college. Hostel facilities are also provided by our university. Hostels are neat, clean, and tidy. The mess for hostel students is available both inside and outside the college. Annual sports are also organized in our university as part of extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities by Sanjay Ghodawat University, Kolhapur.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides world-class infrastructure and is well-maintained. Our college provides big classrooms with projectors. Wi-Fi is available and labs are fully equipped. We have big library with lots of books. Hostel rooms are well-maintained but 4 students in one room feels congested. We have to pay Rs. 57,000 per year for hostel. The quality of food is decent not so good. There is medical inside the campus. Big cricket ground is available for playing.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Sanjay Ghodawat University. A journey of growth and learning.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi. In colleges on almost all floors, there are 3/4 connections per floor. Daily it conducts at least 2/3 games practice. Classrooms are properly ventilated and clean. The college is properly clean and attractive. The college food court is huge. It provides all things. There is a medical and ambulance also for any emergency.

reviews.review_heading: As a student of Sanjay Ghodawat University, I'm absolutely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in our department are very good but not excellent because hostel can't provide Wi-Fi. Food facility is very poor. In terms of medical facilities its very good and this college gives the highest priorities to sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Good Accommodation and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for my program is excellent, with well-equipped labs featuring modern technology, spacious classrooms that facilitate interactive learning, and a well-stocked library with a comprehensive collection of relevant research materials and more.

reviews.review_heading: College has good infrastructure and accommodation.
reviews.review_text: Overall, infrastructure for my course and hostel is good. Facilties available for course are good. There are labs and computers. The quality of facilities in my hostel and mess is good. There are medical, sports and games facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sanjay Ghodawat University.
reviews.review_text: About our college infrastructure, there are lots of facilities available like Wi-Fi available is available at hostel's every floor.

reviews_list.review_title: Sharad Pawar Dental College And Hospital is a good college to pursue a dental course.

review_content.Placements: There were no placements in college. Students after completion of course mostly chose for self-employment, and few joined as a tutor in colleges to teach. Many students continue their practices even after course completion. Some students pursue post-graduation after the course.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a state of the art infrastructure and facilities. There are food court facilities available in the college. There is Wi-Fi enabled in the college, and there are skill labs. There are frequently updated books in the library with journals available. There is separate annexure with devoted OTs and wards with dedicated paramedical staff.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: The most disciplined dental college in Maharashtra.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides good placement opportunities to students after completion of the course. Students from our village opt for post graduation after completing their course. The stipend offered is Rs. 1,500 per month which is low compared to PG fellowship stipend which is much higher. Almost 90% of the students after completing bachelors do internship from college only.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is spread over around 140 acres. The campus has a medical college, a dental college, a nursing college, one ayurvedic college and 2 high schools. It's 8 km away from the city of Wardha, and our dental college is considered to be the 2nd best dental college in Maharashtra. Our college provides free Wi-Fi facility all over the campus. A food court is available where people love to hang out.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2030
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with my decision to choose this college.

review_content.Placements: Total 101 students are in my batch, all of us will get clinical exposure from 3rd year itself unlike in other colleges and medical courses. Also everyday gets to do internship there are sufficient patient flow. PG courses are also provided in 9 branches.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are provided like Wi-Fi in hostel rooms, and the mess food is good as well. Labs are available and can accommodate 100+ students. A cafeteria is also present in the food court. Medical insurance is also provided. Sports events are also held. The library is available, with all books accessible in hard copy and online as well.

review_summary.college_name: Sharad Pawar Dental College And Hospital, Wardha Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Sharad Pawar Dental College And Hospital is a good college to pursue a dental course.

content.Placements: There were no placements in college. Students after completion of course mostly chose for self-employment, and few joined as a tutor in colleges to teach. Many students continue their practices even after course completion. Some students pursue post-graduation after the course.
content.Infrastructure: There is a state of the art infrastructure and facilities. There are food court facilities available in the college. There is Wi-Fi enabled in the college, and there are skill labs. There are frequently updated books in the library with journals available. There is separate annexure with devoted OTs and wards with dedicated paramedical staff.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The most disciplined dental college in Maharashtra.

content.Placements: Our college provides good placement opportunities to students after completion of the course. Students from our village opt for post graduation after completing their course. The stipend offered is Rs. 1,500 per month which is low compared to PG fellowship stipend which is much higher. Almost 90% of the students after completing bachelors do internship from college only.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is spread over around 140 acres. The campus has a medical college, a dental college, a nursing college, one ayurvedic college and 2 high schools. It's 8 km away from the city of Wardha, and our dental college is considered to be the 2nd best dental college in Maharashtra. Our college provides free Wi-Fi facility all over the campus. A food court is available where people love to hang out.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with my decision to choose this college.

content.Placements: Total 101 students are in my batch, all of us will get clinical exposure from 3rd year itself unlike in other colleges and medical courses. Also everyday gets to do internship there are sufficient patient flow. PG courses are also provided in 9 branches.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are provided like Wi-Fi in hostel rooms, and the mess food is good as well. Labs are available and can accommodate 100+ students. A cafeteria is also present in the food court. Medical insurance is also provided. Sports events are also held. The library is available, with all books accessible in hard copy and online as well.

faqs.answer: A:    Indira Gandhi University, Rewari offers various Postgraduate programmes including MA in various disciplines. The duration for this course is two years. The eligibility criteria for IGU Rewari MA admission is Graduation in any discipline from any recognised university with a minimum aggregate of 45%. review_content.Placements: Ahir College has good placement opportunities with many reputed companies visiting every year. Students get decent exposure to internships and job offers however, the placement ratio is low in some branches, and not everyone gets equal opportunities.

Many are facing issues in the hostels.

reviews_list.review_title: The university has proper library facilities.

review_content.Placements: My course is not complete yet, but in the previous course, 60 percent of students got placed. 30 percent of students get internships in the course. The assistant manager is a top role offered in the course. The Axis Bank and Flipkart are the top recruiting companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university has proper library facilities. The well-stocked library is available in our university. The quality of food in the canteen is very good. The mess staff use all safety and hygiene equipment. The hostel facility is available in our university.

Candidates should keep fee receipts with them for future reference. The IGU Rewari MBA fee is INR 73,300. This fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative. The interested candidates must check the official website of IGU Rewari for more details.

overview_faqs.question: What is IGU Meerpur Rewari famous for?
overview_faqs.answer: IGU Meerpur Rewari is famous for programmes, such as, B.E. / B.Tech, BSc, M.A., M.Sc, among others. B.E./ B.Tech at IGU Rewari is offered Computer Science and Engineering. BSc at IGU Rewari is offered across several specialisations such as Medical, Biotechnology, Mathematics, Chemistry, Zoology, etc. M.A. at IGU Rewari is offered in specialisations such as Yoga, Hindi, Political Science, History, English, Economics, and others. MSc is offered across specialisations such as Geography, Zoology, Mathematics, Chemistry, Physics, Botany, Psychology, Biotechnology, and others.

cut_off.college_name: IGU Cutoff 2025: Check JEE Main Round Wise Ranks

description: Indira Gandhi University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to the BTech program. The cutoffs are available in the form of ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates interested in taking admission at Indira Gandhi University can check out the sections below to view the exam, course, and category-wise cutoff details. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Indira Gandhi University cutoff 2025 was released via HSTES entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff was 510621 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 497448.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 510621.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

During the last round, Indira Gandhi University B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 was 510621 for students in the General AI quota. According to this cutoff list, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering proved to be the toughest to get a seat in 2025, while in 2024, the same specialisation had the cutoff rank of 329825, and in 2023, it was 648541. This pattern clearly suggests that the competition for this specialisation has saw fluctuation over the past three years.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: K. Wagh College of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Some say that the PCI-approved syllabus is proper and makes students industry-ready. Still others say that the curriculum could be more aligned with the practical knowledge needed in the industry. The college has a special training and placement cell that provides guidance. Some say that 90 percent of students get placed in good companies. Others say that the average salary package offered is around 3-4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure including well-equipped labs, a library, and Wi-Fi. Some say the hostel facility is also good. Some say that the teaching staff is highly qualified but others say that their teaching techniques and technology need improvement.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Around 40–60% of students who possess the necessary skills are able to secure placements on the college campus. The highest package offered is approximately 3-3.5 lacs, while the lowest package is around 1.5 lacs, resulting in an average of 2.5 LPA. The college attracts top companies, and it also offers valuable support for internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. There are all the facilities available in college, like wi-fi, well-equipped labs, and a library with lots of books and reference books. The hostel facility is good. Food quality is average. The college conducts sports events along with academics.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Detailed review on K.K Wagh college of pharmacy, Nashik.

content.Placements: About 60 to 70 percent of students are placed through the whole batch and the remaining students go for higher education. The highest package is approximately 4 LPAs, and the lowest package is 2 LPAs. Top recruiters such as MYLAN, Blue Cross, Episource, Advantmed, TCS, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are good each classroom has a projector. Free WI-FI is available on the whole campus. On-campus hostel facility, canteen and medical facilities are available Huge ground is available. Sports such as cricket, football, volleyball, basketball, tennis, kabaddi, and indoor games are also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Staff members are highly qualified from good colleges.

content.Placements: About 40-60% students with proper skills get easily placed through college campus. The highest package about 3-3.5 Lacs and the lowest 1lakh and it makes avg of about 2.5 LPA. Top companies visit the college. College provide good support for the internship.
content.Infrastructure: There is all facility available in college like Wi-Fi, labs with all chemicals and equipment and apparatus library with lots of books reference books are also their. About hostel its newly renovated in corona so no worry about hostel and mess with proper food and hygiene. Sports, games and medical facilities are best and provide proper guidance.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and amazing placements. Best facilities in hostel and highly reputed college.

content.Placements: 40% students got placed from the college. The highest package is around 400000 LPA, which is better than other colleges. Advant and Tata hire students in bulk. No student gets internship from the college.. Roles of medical coder, QA and QC departments are available for the students.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure and facilities are best for students. Hostel provides proper food, Wi-Fi facilities along with gym and other activities. Canteen itself is not so good but there are other options to get food stuff. Games and other sports are promoted and also, personal trainers are present for tasks.

faqs.answer: A:    The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Bankura Sammilani Medical College is approximately INR 41247 - INR 90000.

faqs.answer: A:    Bankura Sammilani Medical College offers Degree courses including 4 UG and 26 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Bankura Sammilani Medical College has specializations such as MD specializations in Obstetrics & Gynecology, Radiology & Imaging Science, Forensic Medical Science, Pulmonary Medicine, GNM specializations in General Nursing & Midwifery, M.Sc. specializations in Community Medicine Nursing, Medical Surgical Nursing, Neuro Science & Mental Health Nursing, Obstetrics & Gynaecology Nursing.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Bankura Sammilani Medical College?

reviews_list.review_title: One of the best colleges in West Bengal. Notable alumni members and good facilities at hospital.

review_content.Placements: Once you complete your MBBS you can get placements as RMO in private institutions. Also, if your result is good, you can have a scholarship in different medical colleges. For MD courses, we have huge patient loads. So students can have an apt clinical knowledge combined with good teaching experience.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi assistance is not available. Rooms are airy and spacious. 2-3 members stay in each room. Bathrooms are available. Corridors are cleaned once a week. Mess and canteen are available for food at reasonable cost. Hostel fee is only 12 rupees a month.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: All about Bankura Sammilani Medical College.

review_content.Placements: MBBS graduates are placed as MOs, RMOs, or house staff or go for PG, so they don't need to worry about their placement or salary estimate. House staff has the package of 45000. The PG course has the package of 53,000. Others have the package of 50,000. No one is unplaced after being a doctor from this college, a government medical college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure needs to be updated; lifts are not that much in working order; fans, beds, and bathrooms are not that clean. Though college authority is trying their best to update, there is still a lot of scope for being updated. Security concerns are also there, so security guards and CCTVs are also implemented.

reviews_list.batch_info: General Nursing and Midwifery (GNM) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Bankura Sammilani Medical College & Hospital is good for GNM training.

review_content.Placements: There are 82 students in my class and a total of 270 students in the Nursing Training School. 80 students are doing internships in Bankura Sammilani Medical College & Hospital. There is a stipend system available after the internship, given by the Nursing Council.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is good, with hostel facilities, a demonstration room, a library, an auditorium, and a playground. The college faculty is helpful. Hostel quality is average, with all government facilities such as water and electricity supplied by the government.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: It's a great college with great teachers.

content.Placements: It gives a great placement because it’s a government medical college with 4.5 years of MBBS and 1 year of compulsory internship you have to do. You also have a great opportunity to do MS/MD, which is also a developed portion with a great system.
content.Infrastructure: Here the course is MBBS (Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery), a great course for which a lot of students dream and do everything for it. You have to crack the NEET UG exam with a good rank for admission in this college. Here you will get college after 1st year, which is also great.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is the best for academics, internships, and placements. It has moderate infrastructure.

content.Placements: It has 100% placements. The salary package ranges between Rs. 30,000-75,000 per month. No specific company gives placements but we may directly get into private nursing homes or government jobs. 100% of students get internship opportunities for 1 year and it's mandatory by the government with a current salary of Rs. 43,000 per month. The highest paying internship after MBBS except for AFMC. We may easily get a house stuff ship or private nursing home job or block primary health officer job after MBBS from here.
content.Infrastructure: It is more than 100 years old college. The infrastructure is not so good but moderate. Academics here are excellent. Here the library is the largest library among all government medical colleges of West Bengal and Wi-Fi is free here. The hostel infrastructure is poor. There is very good clinical exposure and 4th in OPD patient loads. It has also started its trauma care facility along with a separate super-specialty facility for neuro, cardio, and gastro. It is the best for obstetrics and gynecology all over West Bengal.

content.Placements: There are 82 students in my class and a total of 270 students in the Nursing Training School. 80 students are doing internships in Bankura Sammilani Medical College & Hospital. There is a stipend system available after the internship, given by the Nursing Council.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is good, with hostel facilities, a demonstration room, a library, an auditorium, and a playground. The college faculty is helpful. Hostel quality is average, with all government facilities such as water and electricity supplied by the government.

admission_process.title: Bankura Sammilani Medical College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Bankura Sammilani Medical College admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Bankura Sammilani Medical Collegeoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.Sc., GNM, Master of Surgery and M.Sc. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 41,247 - 90,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 66 months - 3 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years - 3 years.

description: Bankura Sammilani Medical College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Bankura Sammilani Medical College NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 20819 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Bankura Sammilani Medical College MBBS cutoff 2025 was 20819 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 22143 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Bankura Sammilani Medical College accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Bankura Sammilani Medical College NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 69502 to 152270. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Bankura Sammilani Medical College MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Social and Preventive Medicine/Community Medicine, followed by MD in Physiology and MD in Bio-Chemistry. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 69502, 142289 and 152270, respectively.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Below are the round, category, and year-wise West Bengal NEET PG cutoff ranks for admission to the MD courses. For 2024, the latest round cutoff data is available. On the contrary, for 2023 and 2022, candidates can view the last-round cutoff ranks for all the courses offered at Bankura Sammilani Medical College. reviews.review_heading: It's a great college with great teachers.
reviews.review_text: Here the course is MBBS (Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery), a great course for which a lot of students dream and do everything for it. You have to crack the NEET UG exam with a good rank for admission in this college. Here you will get college after 1st year, which is also great.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best for academics, internships, and placements. It has moderate infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It is more than 100 years old college. The infrastructure is not so good but moderate. Academics here are excellent. Here the library is the largest library among all government medical colleges of West Bengal and Wi-Fi is free here. The hostel infrastructure is poor. There is very good clinical exposure and 4th in OPD patient loads. It has also started its trauma care facility along with a separate super-specialty facility for neuro, cardio, and gastro. It is the best for obstetrics and gynecol...

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in West Bengal. Notable alumni members and good facilities at hospital.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi assistance is not available. Rooms are airy and spacious. 2-3 members stay in each room. Bathrooms are available. Corridors are cleaned once a week. Mess and canteen are available for food at reasonable cost. Hostel fee is only 12 rupees a month.

reviews.review_heading: All about Bankura Sammilani Medical College.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure needs to be updated; lifts are not that much in working order; fans, beds, and bathrooms are not that clean. 
Though college authority is trying their best to update, there is still a lot of scope for being updated. 
Security concerns are also there, so security guards and CCTVs are also implemented.

reviews.review_heading: Bankura Sammilani Medical College & Hospital is good for GNM training.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is good, with hostel facilities, a demonstration room, a library, an auditorium, and a playground. The college faculty is helpful. Hostel quality is average, with all government facilities such as water and electricity supplied by the government.

reviews.review_heading: In terms of infrastructure and study scope, my college is such a nice college.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is too good, and the facilities are very helpful for students. They also teach more carefully. Here, the library, auditorium, and laboratories are also available. In our college, sports games are available. A huge playground is also there. Boys' and girls' hostels are available, and the mess/canteen is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: A college which needs serious improvement but some seriously knowledgeable faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is in a very poor condition. We don't have Wi-Fi anywhere other then library and it is of very poor quality so we can't rely on it. The food provided in the mess is the worse thing you will ever consumer, it is of very poor quality, many times u can find wants and cockroaches in the them and the plates they are served in is liked by dogs many a times. The biggest problem is for vegetarian people you can't find nice vegetarian food at cheap rates. There is no facility for sport...

reviews.review_heading: An old but gold college (with a lot of things to improve) .
reviews.review_text: College is not built within a campus as such, there are 2 college buildings: Lokepur campus and Nutan Bhavan,  3 boys hostel a 1 girls hostel along with 2 hospital buildings: Govindnagar Hospital and Superspeciality building. Boys Hostel is not so clean but it is cleaned regularly. All other accessories provided are adequate and in good quality. Rooms are spacious with proper ventilation. As Bankura is a little backward area with lot of greenery so insects and sometimes snakes are also seen. Ove...

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Lecture theatres are air conditioned and sanitation is good. There are three boys hostel and a ladies hostel, the overall condition of which is good. The food served by the mess is decent and edible. Sports events are organised periodically at different times of a year.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely amazing because you will make lots of friends, faculty and teachers are amazing, .
reviews.review_text: Our anatomy department is not that good, but other department is nice. Hostel is nice and in my room, it is fully tyles. You always gonna enjoy sports like football, table tennis. Canteen food is good, above average. We have to pay our own meals. Rice is available two times in a day.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best and oldest medical colleges in the periphery of kolkata,efficient clinical exposure.
reviews.review_text: Administrative building of the college is pretty good with ambient seating spaces in lecture theaters ( we have total 4 plus one central lecture theater). Hospital buliding is also made on a big chunk of land so efficient space of various departments is available. We have various smart boards in classrooms and a well spaced library with all necessary books available. Library has free unlimited wi- fi too. There are 4 hostel buildings for boys and 2 buildings for girls. Both are in separate campu...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has beautiful architecture. The infrastructure is excellent. We have two separate hostels for boys. There are two canteens and four messes. Breakfast, snacks, and dinner are available from the canteen. There is a large library with Wi-Fi and well-maintained facilities where you can read for at least 6 hours. There are separate departments and all HODs are too specialized to manage situations with ease.

reviews.review_heading: It is the second-best medical college in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: Our college is not well-maintained. The food served in our college is average. All classrooms have projectors. The library is Wi-Fi enabled. We have the biggest medical library in East India.

reviews.review_heading: It is a kind of average medical college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. All kinds of labs are available here, but the hostel is kind of average. It has spacious rooms with ambient lighting and ventilation but doesn't have good cleaning services. A pile of trash can be seen everywhere, and no security guard is available for the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bankura Sammilani Medical College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent and not much to expect from a 100-year-old college. This college is timely renovated and has necessary infrastructural changes. For students, a new hostel is being completely renovated and there are 4 large grounds to play cricket and football and also has inside the hostel grounds for badminton and volleyball. There are 2 academic buildings, one for 1st-year students and another one for 2nd-year to final-year students. There are 5 lecture theatres in total, 4 with 1...
